title: OACP Gate Result Payload (v1)
description: Payload schema for messages with payloadType = 'gate-result-v1' (carried in GATE_RESULT messages). The envelope's responseTo block correlates this result to the original GATE_REQUEST. Per spec §11 — minimal v0.1 sketch.

gateId.description: Echo of the gate that ran.

validationResultRef.description: Reference to the typed ValidationResult artifact. artifactType MUST be VALIDATION_RESULT.

subjectRef.description: Reference to the artifact that was validated.

evidenceCollectedRefs.description: Evidence artifacts collected during gate execution.

metrics.description: Quantitative metrics produced by the gate. Shape is gate-specific.

diagnostics.description: Optional structured diagnostic findings (e.g., for FAILED or INCONCLUSIVE results).
